rationale: Hard pass. The Goku/Dragon Ball anime aggression hook is a tonal, visual, and demographic mismatch on every axis: it targets young male shonen fans with high-contrast yellow/red/black palettes and shouting VO, while Marble Sort! sells calm, pastel, female-skewing 25-55 satisfaction with no characters or combat. There is also no plausible bridge from a punch charge-up to a physics-tap color-sorting loop, so even a Frankenstein splice would feel deceptive and tank IPM/retention quality.
